case_title: MCKEE, THOMAS CLAYTON VS QUINN, DAMION JOSEPH

docket_entries.description: NEED TO RESET COURT DATE. WILL BE IN AND OUT OF 07/07/05 THRU 11/2005. SCHEDULE BEFORE OR AFTER THE LISTED DATES.
